name: Dr. Sarah Chen
article_title: Metabolic Adaptation in Long-Term Caloric Restriction
article_summary: Explores how metabolism adapts during prolonged caloric restriction and its implications for longevity and healthspan

name: Dr. James Okafor
article_title: Cardiovascular Risk Stratification Using Machine Learning
article_summary: Proposes a novel ML framework for predicting cardiovascular events using patient biomarkers and lifestyle data
research_signals: cardiovascular health, machine learning, risk prediction

name: Dr. Priya Nair
article_title: Gut Microbiome Diversity and Metabolic Resilience
article_summary: Investigates the relationship between gut microbiome composition and metabolic resilience in aging populations
research_signals: gut health, microbiome, metabolic resilience, aging

name: Dr. Lucas Brennan
article_title: Intermittent Fasting Protocols and Cellular Autophagy
article_summary: Examines how different intermittent fasting protocols trigger autophagy and their downstream effects on cellular health
research_signals: intermittent fasting, autophagy, cellular health, longevity

name: Dr. Aiko Tanaka
article_title: Epigenetic Clocks as Biomarkers of Biological Age
article_summary: Reviews the current state of epigenetic clock research and their potential as reliable biomarkers for biological aging
